source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Write down the state equation expression for the signal flow graph shown in <image>.
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: \(\left[\begin{array}{c}\dot{x}_1 \\ \dot{x}_2 \\ \vdots \\ \dot{x}_n\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{llll}0 & 1 & \cdots & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 1 & 0 \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \vdots \\ -a_n & -a_{n-1} & \cdots & -a_1\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+\left[\begin{array}{c}0 \\ 0 \\ \vdots \\ 1\end{array}\right] u, y=\left[\begin{array}{llll}b_n & b_{n-1} & \cdots & b_1\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+b_0 u\)

choice_map.A: \(\left[\begin{array}{c}\dot{x}_1 \\ \dot{x}_2 \\ \vdots \\ \dot{x}_n\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{llll}1 & 0 & \cdots & 0 \\ 1 & 0 & 1 & 0 \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \vdots \\ -a_n & -a_{n-1} & \cdots & -a_1\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+\left[\begin{array}{c}1 \\ 0 \\ \vdots \\ 0\end{array}\right] u, y=\left[\begin{array}{llll}b_1 & b_{n-1} & \cdots & b_0\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+b_n u\)
choice_map.B: \(\left[\begin{array}{c}\dot{x}_1 \\ \dot{x}_2 \\ \vdots \\ \dot{x}_n\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{llll}0 & 0 & \cdots & 0 \\ 0 & 1 & 1 & 0 \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \vdots \\ -a_1 & -a_2 & \cdots & -a_n\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+\left[\begin{array}{c}1 \\ 1 \\ \vdots \\ 0\end{array}\right] u, y=\left[\begin{array}{llll}b_1 & b_2 & \cdots & b_n\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+b_0 u\)
choice_map.C: \(\left[\begin{array}{c}\dot{x}_1 \\ \dot{x}_2 \\ \vdots \\ \dot{x}_n\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{llll}0 & 1 & \cdots & 0 \\ 0 & 1 & 0 & 0 \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \vdots \\ -a_1 & -a_2 & \cdots & -a_n\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+\left[\begin{array}{c}0 \\ 1 \\ \vdots \\ 0\end{array}\right] u, y=\left[\begin{array}{llll}b_1 & b_2 & \cdots & b_n\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+b_0 u\)
choice_map.D: \(\left[\begin{array}{c}\dot{x}_1 \\ \dot{x}_2 \\ \vdots \\ \dot{x}_n\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{llll}0 & 1 & \cdots & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 1 & 0 \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \vdots \\ -a_n & -a_{n-1} & \cdots & -a_1\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+\left[\begin{array}{c}0 \\ 0 \\ \vdots \\ 1\end{array}\right] u, y=\left[\begin{array}{llll}b_n & b_{n-1} & \cdots & b_1\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+b_0 u\)

field_audit_records.before_value: \(\left[\begin{array}{c}\dot{x}_1 \\ \dot{x}_2 \\ \vdots \\ \dot{x}_n\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{llll}0 & 1 & \cdots & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 1 & 0 \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \vdots \\ -a_n & -a_{n-1} & \cdots & -a_1\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+\left[\begin{array}{c}0 \\ 0 \\ \vdots \\ 1\end{array}\right] u, y=\left[\begin{array}{llll}b_n & b_{n-1} & \cdots & b_1\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+b_0 u\)
field_audit_records.after_value: \(\left[\begin{array}{c}\dot{x}_1 \\ \dot{x}_2 \\ \vdots \\ \dot{x}_n\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{llll}0 & 1 & \cdots & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 1 & 0 \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \vdots \\ -a_n & -a_{n-1} & \cdots & -a_1\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+\left[\begin{array}{c}0 \\ 0 \\ \vdots \\ 1\end{array}\right] u, y=\left[\begin{array}{llll}b_n & b_{n-1} & \cdots & b_1\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+b_0 u\)

rewrite_reports.rationale: The original prompt is already an open-ended, image-grounded question asking for the state-space expression, so it can be preserved without relying on the multiple-choice options.

variants.title: Dataset Open Question
variants.rewritten_question_text: Write down the state-space equation expression for the signal flow graph shown in the image.
variants.expected_answer: \(\left[\begin{array}{c}\dot{x}_1 \\ \dot{x}_2 \\ \vdots \\ \dot{x}_n\end{array}\right]=\left[\begin{array}{llll}0 & 1 & \cdots & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & 1 & 0 \\ \vdots & \vdots & \vdots & \vdots \\ -a_n & -a_{n-1} & \cdots & -a_1\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+\left[\begin{array}{c}0 \\ 0 \\ \vdots \\ 1\end{array}\right] u, y=\left[\begin{array}{llll}b_n & b_{n-1} & \cdots & b_1\end{array}\right]\left[\begin{array}{c}x_1 \\ x_2 \\ \vdots \\ x_n\end{array}\right]+b_0 u\)
